sentences.text: The RVA23 profiles are intended to align implementations of RISC-V 64-bit application processors to allow binary software ecosystems to rely on a large set of guaranteed extensions and a small number of discoverable coarse-grain options.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles

sentences.text: It is explicitly a non-goal of RVA23 to allow more hardware implementation flexibility by supporting only a minimal set of features and a large number of fine-grain extensions.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles

sentences.text: Only user-mode (RVA23U64) and supervisor-mode (RVA23S64) profiles are specified in this family.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles

sentences.text: The RVA23U64 profile specifies the ISA features available to user-mode execution environments in 64-bit applications processors.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile

sentences.text: This is the most important profile within the application processor family in terms of the amount of software that targets this profile.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile

sentences.text: RV64I is the mandatory base ISA for RVA23U64 and is little-endian.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Base

sentences.text: As per the unprivileged architecture specification, the `ECALL` instruction causes a requested trap to the execution environment.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Base

sentences.text: The following mandatory extensions were present in RVA22U64.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: extlink:m[] Integer multiplication and division. - extlink:a[] Atomic instructions. - Single-precision floating-point instructions. - Double-precision floating-point instructions. - extlink:c[] Compressed instructions. - Bit-manipulation instructions. - extlink:zicsr[] CSR instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: These are implied by presence of F. - Base counters and timers. - Hardware performance counters. - Main memory regions with both the cacheability and coherence PMAs must support instruction fetch, and any instruction fetches of naturally aligned power-of-2 sizes up to min(ILEN,XLEN) (i.e., 32 bits for RVA23) are atomic. - Main memory regions with both the cacheability and coherence PMAs must support RsrvEventual. - Main memory regions with both the cacheability and coherence PMAs must support all atomics in the Zaamo extension. - Misaligned loads and stores to main memory regions with both the cacheability and coherence PMAs must be supported. - Reservation sets are contiguous, naturally aligned, and a maximum of 64 bytes. - Pause hint. - Cache blocks must be 64 bytes in size, naturally aligned in the address space. - Cache-block management instructions. - Cache-block prefetch instructions. - Cache-Block Zero Instructions. - ext:zfhmin[] Half-precision floating-point. - Data-independent execution latency.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: The following mandatory extensions are new in RVA23U64:
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: NOTE: V was optional in RVA22U64.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Vector minimal half-precision floating-point.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Vector basic bit-manipulation instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Vector data-independent execution latency.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Non-temporal locality hints.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Integer conditional operations.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: ext:zimop[] may-be-operations.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: ext:zcmop[] Compressed may-be-operations.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: ext:zcb[] Additional compressed instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Additional floating-Point instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Wait-on-reservation-set instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Pointer masking, with the execution environment providing a means to select PMLEN=0 and PMLEN=7 at minimum.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: The following localized options are new in RVA23U64:
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Localized Options

sentences.text: Vector crypto NIST algorithms with GCM. - Vector crypto ShangMi algorithms with GCM.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Localized Options

sentences.text: NOTE: The scalar crypto extensions Zkn and Zks that were options in RVA22 are not options in RVA23.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Localized Options

sentences.text: The goal is for both hardware and software vendors to move to use vector crypto, as vectors are now mandatory and vector crypto is substantially faster than scalar crypto.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Localized Options

sentences.text: NOTE: We have included only the Zvkng/Zvksg options with GCM to standardize on a higher performance crypto alternative.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Localized Options

sentences.text: Zvbc is listed as a development option for use in other algorithms, and will become mandatory.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Localized Options

sentences.text: Scalar Zbc is now listed as an expansion option, i.e., it will probably not become mandatory.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Localized Options

sentences.text: The following are new development options intended to become mandatory in a future RVA profile.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Development Options

sentences.text: Byte and halfword atomic memory operations. - Compare-and-Swap instructions. - Main memory regions with both the coherence and cacheability PMAs must provide `AMOCASQ` level PMA support.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Development Options

sentences.text: NOTE: Ziccamoc ensures Compare and Swap instructions are properly supported in main memory regions.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Development Options

sentences.text: Vector carryless multiplication. - Misaligned loads, stores, and AMOs to main memory regions that do not cross a naturally aligned 16-byte boundary are atomic.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Development Options

sentences.text: NOTE: Zama16b represents the presence of the new Misaligned Atomicity Granule feature added in Sm1p13.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Development Options

sentences.text: The following expansion options were also present in RVA22U64:
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: Scalar half-precision floating-point.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: The following are new expansion options in RVA23U64:
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: Scalar carryless multiply. - Landing Pads. - Shadow Stack. - Vector half-precision floating-point. - Scalar BF16 converts. - Vector BF16 converts. - Vector BF16 widening mul-add.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: There are no transitory options in RVA23U64.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Transitory Options

sentences.text: NOTE: Scalar crypto is no longer an option in RVA23U64, though the Zbc extension has now been exposed as an expansion option.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Optional Extensions > Transitory Options

sentences.text: Implementations are strongly recommended to raise illegal-instruction exceptions on attempts to execute unimplemented opcodes.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23U64 Profile > RVA23U64 Recommendations

sentences.text: The RVA23S64 profile specifies the ISA features available to a supervisor-mode execution environment in 64-bit applications processors. RVA23S64 is based on privileged architecture version 1.13.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile

sentences.text: RV64I is the mandatory base ISA for RVA23S64 and is little-endian.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Base

sentences.text: The `ECALL` instruction operates as per the unprivileged architecture specification.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Base

sentences.text: An `ECALL` in user mode causes a contained trap to supervisor mode.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Base

sentences.text: An `ECALL` in supervisor mode causes a requested trap to the execution environment.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Base

sentences.text: The following unprivileged extensions are mandatory:
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: The RVA23S64 mandatory unprivileged extensions include all the mandatory unprivileged extensions in RVA23U64.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: NOTE: Zifencei is mandated as it is the only standard way to support instruction-cache coherence in RVA23 application processors. A new instruction-cache coherence mechanism is under development (tentatively named Zjid) which might be added as an option in the future.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: The following privileged extensions are mandatory:
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: *Ss1p13* Supervisor architecture version 1.13.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: NOTE: Ss1p13 supersedes Ss1p12.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: The following privileged extensions were also mandatory in RVA22S64:
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: The `satp` mode Bare must be supported.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Page-based 39-bit virtual-Memory system.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Page-fault exceptions are raised when a page is accessed when A bit is clear, or written when D bit is clear.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Main memory regions with both the cacheability and coherence PMAs must support hardware page-table reads.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: `stvec.MODE` must be capable of holding the value 0 (Direct).
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: When `stvec.MODE=Direct`, `stvec.BASE` must be capable of holding any valid four-byte-aligned address.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: `stval` must be written with the faulting virtual address for load, store, and instruction page-fault, access-fault, and misaligned exceptions, and for breakpoint exceptions that are defined to write an address to stval, other than those caused by execution of the `EBREAK` or `C.EBREAK` instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: For virtual-instruction and illegal-instruction exceptions, `stval` must be written with the faulting instruction.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: For any `hpmcounter` that is not read-only zero, the corresponding bit in `scounteren` must be writable.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Fine-grained address-translation cache invalidation.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: The following are new mandatory extensions:
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: NAPOT translation contiguity.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: NOTE: Svnapot was optional in RVA22.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: supervisor-mode timer interrupts.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: NOTE: Sstc was optional in RVA22.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: count overflow and mode-based filtering.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: Pointer masking, with `senvcfg.PMM` and `henvcfg.PMM` supporting, at minimum, settings PMLEN=0 and PMLEN=7.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: `sstatus.UXL` must be capable of holding the value 2 (i.e., UXLEN=64 must be supported).
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: NOTE: Ssu64xl was optional in RVA22.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: The augmented hypervisor extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: NOTE: Sha was optional in RVA22.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Mandatory Extensions

sentences.text: RVA23S64 has the same unprivileged options as RVA23U64.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions

sentences.text: The privileged options in RVA23S64 are listed in the following sections.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions

sentences.text: There are no privileged localized options in RVA23S64.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Localized Options

sentences.text: There are no privileged development options in RVA23S64.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Development Options

sentences.text: The following privileged expansion options were present in RVA22S64:
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: Page-based 48-bit virtual-memory system.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: Page-based 57-bit virtual-memory system.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: The following are new privileged expansion options in RVA23S64
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: No non-conforming extensions are present.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: Attempts to execute unimplemented opcodes or access unimplemented CSRs in the standard or reserved encoding spaces raises an illegal instruction exception that results in a contained trap to the supervisor-mode trap handler.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: NOTE: Ssstrict does not prescribe behavior for the custom encoding spaces or CSRs.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: NOTE: Ssstrict definition applies to the execution environment claiming to be RVA23S64-compatible, which must have the hypervisor extension.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: That execution environment will take a contained trap to supervisor-mode (however that trap is implemented, including, but not limited to, emulation/delegation in the outer execution environment).
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: Ssstrict (and all the other RVA23S64 mandates and options) does not apply to any guest VMs run by a hypervisor.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: An RVA23S64 hypervisor can provide guest VMs that are also RVA23S64-compatible but with an expanded set of emulated standard instructions.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: An RVA23S64 hypervisor can also choose to implement guest VMs that are not RVA23S64 compatible (e.g., lacking H, or only RVA20S64).
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: Transitions from invalid to valid PTEs will be visible in bounded time without an explicit memory-management fence.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: Supervisor-mode pointer masking, with the supervisor execution environment providing a means to select PMLEN=0 and PMLEN=7 at minimum.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Expansion Options

sentences.text: There are no privileged transitory options in RVA23S64.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Optional Extensions > Transitory Options

sentences.text: Implementations are strongly recommended to raise illegal-instruction exceptions when attempting to execute unimplemented opcodes or access unimplemented CSRs.
sentences.section: Preamble > RVA23 Profiles > RVA23S64 Profile > RVA23S64 Recommendations
